category_title: Low-proficiency international students with high linguistic anxiety and reliance on external support
minimal_context: The student is writing a 100-word comment on a peer's blog post after giving a presentation.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please write a 100-word comment on your classmate's blog post about their presentation.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I think their presentation was really good in the class. I did the presentation after them and I felt a little tense, because they did it so good.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What else can you write in your comment?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: In overall their English are very good.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to write a bit more to reach the word count.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I will just write: I hope we can be friends and you can tell me how you study English well.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please write a 100-word comment on your classmate's blog post about their presentation.

STUDENT: I think their presentation was really good in the class. I did the presentation after them and I felt a little tense, because they did it so good.

TUTOR: What else can you write in your comment?

STUDENT: In overall their English are very good.

TUTOR: You need to write a bit more to reach the word count.

STUDENT: I will just write: I hope we can be friends and you can tell me how you study English well.

task.content: Writing a 100+ word comment on a peer's blog post

context.time_context: after doing a presentation following a high-proficiency peer

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: I did the presentation after you and I felt a little tense, because you did it so good
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: ask peer 'how you study English well'; hope we can be friends
related_quotes: I hope we can be friends and you can tell me how you study English well.

behavior_patterns.condition: I did the presentation after you and I felt a little tense, because you did it so good
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: ask peer 'how you study English well'
related_quotes: I hope we can be friends and you can tell me how you study English well.
